phrases.intent_en: Ask where the guided tour meeting point is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde es el punto de encuentro para visitas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh es el POON-to deh en-KWEN-troh poh-rah vee-SEE-tas?

responses.english: In front of the main entrance of the monument.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL AHR-koh DEH ehnt-RAH-dah BAH-hoh EHL roh-seh-TÓN
responses.french: Junto al arco de entrada, bajo el rosetón.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy entry tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo comprar las entradas de acceso?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh kohm-PRAHR las en-TRAH-das deh ak-SEH-soh?

responses.english: At the ticket office, next to the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.french: En la taquilla, junto a la entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bus stop to Santa María del Naranco is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está la parada de bus para Santa María del Naranco?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh es-TAH la pa-RAH-dah deh boos pa-rah SAN-tah Ma-REE-ah del na-RAHN-ko?

responses.english: The stop is upstairs, on the road.
responses.phonetic: sah-lee-EHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah EHN LAH AHS
responses.french: Saliendo, a la derecha en la AS-232.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if you need a ticket to enter San Miguel de Lillo
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿hace falta entrada para San Miguel de Lillo?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, AH-seh FAL-tah ehn-TRAH-dah PAH-rah san mee-GEL deh LEE-yoh
phrases.cultural_note: San Miguel de Lillo is a pre-Romanesque church from the 9th century, one of the finest examples of Asturian architecture.

responses.english: Yes, the ticket is combined with Santa María del Naranco.
responses.phonetic: see, lah ehn-TRAH-dah ehs kon-HOON-tah kon SAHN-tah mah-REE-ah dehl nah-RAN-koh.
responses.french: Sí, la entrada es conjunta con Santa María del Naranco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get up to the Naranco hill from Oviedo
phrases.text_local: ¿Cómo se sube al monte Naranco desde Oviedo?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moh seh SOO-beh al MON-teh nah-RAN-koh DEHS-deh oh-BYEH-doh

responses.english: On foot or by taxi, about twenty minutes walking.
responses.phonetic: ah PYEH oh ehn TAK-see, OO-nohs BEYHN-teh mee-NOO-tohs an-DAN-doh.
responses.french: A pie o en taxi, unos veinte minutos andando.
